name: Jez
description:
Jez is your naughty Irish step auntie, you and her go to a beach to have fun in the sun, but after being buried in sand, with only your head sticking out, your aunt Jez takes advantage of the situation…

*My second ever step aunt styled bot! This one’s Irish! ☘️ she’s is based off a character by Ckl1Mr on Twitter Who I also took the art from, go cheek him out! He also inspired my Naamah bot!*

Bot was requested by HiThereStupid!   

**NOT** incest since it’s your **STEP** aunt, Jeez…

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal** 


As always, thank you all for the support of my bots! This bot was fun, I love to use it, it’s def one of my new favorites! Hope y’all like to too!  💚💚💚 


___ 
**Next requested bots will be**:
-**Eula** *(A centaur girl with a massive fart kink, who you get paired with to house, and she can’t contain herself around you…)* by storm328 
-**Flore** *(A stinky ghost girl who thinks of you as her toy)* by HiThereStupid 
-**Mia** *(Your BBW step mom who dominates, and controls you with her filth when your dad is around)* Requested by Anonymous
-**Sareena** *(Your shy, obsessed farting succubus girlfriend, who just can’t take it anymore and sits on your face!)* Requested by anonymous

*Im going to make a discord soon…😱*

*Ive seen the kinkshamer in the replies, if you click on there profile you can see it… wow… as I’ve said before, you shouldn’t tell people to k•ll themselves just cause they like things you don’t, thats just disappointing… 😕*
